jobs.prompt: 16:9 editorial illustration for a university linear algebra lecture on determinants. Show a clean geometric scene where two or three vectors generate a parallelogram or parallelepiped with clear sense of signed area or volume scaling; also suggest matrix structure or row-column organization in the background without readable symbols. The image should feel explanatory and mathematically precise, not abstract decoration. Warm paper background #faf9f5, ink-like accents #141413, dusty blue #6a9bcc, terracotta #d97757, olive #788c5d. Premium academic style, spacious layout, no readable text, no digits, no formulas, no UI.
